data.name: 邂逅酒吧
data.detailed_description:
遊戲背景：

又是疲憊不堪的一天，你拿著公事包又來到了這家偶遇酒吧。還好今天偶遇到了新女孩，這次一定要給她點黃色看看！

遊戲特色：

三種真機率不同的遊戲玩法，有搖骰子、猜拳、對對碰

多樣的CG場景，用手指、舌頭、羽毛、皮鞭、打樁機等各種道具應有盡有

女性角色分為魅魔、女僕、JK三種形態

有趣創意的休閒桌遊玩法

data.short_description: "ENCOUNTER BAR" is a casual board game. Each girl has different CG and a variety of teasing props, and they have many different forms. Do you choose to use feathers? Whips? Candles? Or vibrators? Your climax is up to you.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 丹麥文*, 俄文*, 土耳其文*, 日文*, 波蘭文*, 簡體中文*, 繁體中文*, 荷蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 韓文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

  • 作業系統 *: win7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core-i3 or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated/independent
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線

  • 音效卡: soundblaster

建議配備:

  • 處理器: Intel Core-i3 or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated/independent
  • 網路: 寬頻網際網路連線

data.name: ENCOUNTER BAR
data.detailed_description:
Game background:

It's another tiring day, and you come to this encounter bar with your briefcase. Fortunately, I met a new girl today, and I must show her some yellow this time!

Game features:

Three real probability gameplays, including dice shaking, rock-paper-scissors, and matching

Various CG scenes, with all kinds of props such as fingers, tongues, feathers, whips, pile drivers, etc.

Female characters are divided into three forms: succubus, maid, and JK

Interesting and creative casual board game gameplay
